calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-16-2003 Off Calendar

Default Prove Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Jun-27-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S, Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lee Batara..
Appearances:
P. Robert J. Perkiss, Esq. for Plaintiff United Meat Company, Inc.
William Gee, Bookeeper, also present, was sworn & examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, plaintiff's declarations, the Court rules in favor of the plaintiff United Meat Company and against the defendant Steven Fretz.
Principal of $35,641.91
Attorney's fees of $3,937.00
Costs of $375.00
Interest of $564.30
For the total of $40,518.21
Defendants: Redwood Park LLC and Does 1 to 10- Dismissed.
Judgment signed in open court.

Dpu Scd 218 At 9:00 Am.
Off Calendar Jun-18-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This casuse came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S, Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lee Batara..
